functions.body:
local timeout="${1:-$BASH4LLM_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HISTORY}"
local dir="${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR:-$PWD/bash4llm.d/history}"
local max_files="${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_MAX_FILES:-100}"
local max_bytes="${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_MAX_BYTES:-104857600}"
local keep_days="${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_KEEP_DAYS:-90}"
local now_epoch="" cutoff="" f="" f_mtime=""
now_epoch=$(date +%s)
cutoff=$(( now_epoch - (keep_days * 86400) ))
while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do
  f_mtime=$(_file_mtime "$f")
  if [ "$f_mtime" -gt 0 ] && [ "$f_mtime" -lt "$cutoff" ]; then
    lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" "$timeout" -- rm -f -- "$f" || true
  fi
done < <(find "$dir" -type f -print0 2>/dev/null)
local total=0
local -a entries=()
local oldest_mtime="" oldest_size="" oldest_path=""
while IFS='|' read -r oldest_mtime oldest_size oldest_path; do
  [ -z "$oldest_path" ] && continue
  total=$(( total + oldest_size ))
  entries+=( "$oldest_size|$oldest_path" )
done < <(
  find "$dir" -type f -print0 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do
    printf '%s|%s|%s\n' "$(_file_mtime "$f")" "$(file_size "$f")" "$f"
  done | sort -t'|' -k1,1n
)
if [ "$total" -gt "$max_bytes" ] && [ "${#entries[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
  for entry in ${entries[@]+"${entries[@]}"}; do
    oldest_size="${entry%%|*}"
    oldest_path="${entry#*|}"
    if [ -f "$oldest_path" ] && lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" "$timeout" -- rm -f -- "$oldest_path"; then
      total=$(( total - oldest_size ))
      [ "$total" -le "$max_bytes" ] && break
    fi
  done
fi
local count="${#entries[@]}"
if [ "$count" -gt "$max_files" ] && [ "${#entries[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
  for entry in ${entries[@]+"${entries[@]}"}; do
    oldest_path="${entry#*|}"
    if [ -f "$oldest_path" ] && lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" "$timeout" -- rm -f -- "$oldest_path"; then
      count=$(( count - 1 ))
      [ "$count" -le "$max_files" ] && break
    fi
  done
fi
return 0

local content="${1:-}"
local filename="" tmpf="" dest="" lockfile="" rc=""
filename="$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-groq-output-$$.txt"
safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR" 700
tmpf="$(_tmpf file "$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR" groq-out 2>/dev/null)"
if [ -z "$tmpf" ]; then
  log_error "HISTORYFAIL" "save_to_history: cannot allocate tmp file in $BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if ! printf '%s\n' "$content" > "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null; then
  rm -f -- "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true
  log_error "HISTORYFAIL" "save_to_history: cannot write tmp file $tmpf"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
dest="$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR/$filename"
lockfile="$HISTORY_LOCK"
if ! lock_exec "$lockfile" "$BASH4LLM_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HISTORY" -- bash -c '
    set -e
    mv -f -- "$1" "$2"
    chmod 600 "$2" 2>/dev/null || true
  ' _ "$tmpf" "$dest"
then
  rc=$?
  rm -f -- "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true
  return "$rc"
fi
if [ -f "$dest" ]; then
  local size_bytes ts base history_json
  size_bytes="$(file_size "$dest" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
  base="$(basename "$dest")"
  history_json="$(jq -c -n \
    --arg path "$dest" \
    --arg base "$base" \
    --arg ts "$ts" \
    --argjson size "$size_bytes" \
    '{saved:true, path:$path, basename:$base, ts:$ts, size_bytes:$size}')"
  ui_state_write "last_history.json" "$history_json" \
    || log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to write last_history.json"
else
  local ts history_json
  ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
  history_json="$(jq -c -n --arg ts "$ts" '{saved:false, ts:$ts}')"
  ui_state_write "last_history.json" "$history_json" || true
fi
if [ "${BASH4LLM_ROTATE_HISTORY:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  rotate_history "$BASH4LLM_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HISTORY" || true
fi
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  log_info "HISTORY_SAVE" "$dest"
fi
return 0

local manifest="${1:-}"
local timeout="${2:-$BASH4LLM_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MODELS}"
safe_mkdir "$(dirname "$manifest")" 700
lock_exec "${manifest}.lock" "$timeout" -- bash -c '
 set -e
 manifest="$1"
 tmp="$(mktemp "$(dirname "$manifest")/manifest.tmp.XXXXXX")"
 printf "%s" "{\"parts\":[]}" > "$tmp"
 if [ -n "${B64_WRAP_OPT:-}" ]; then
   base64 ${B64_WRAP_OPT} "$tmp" > "${manifest}.b64"
 else
   base64 "$tmp" | tr -d "\n" > "${manifest}.b64"
 fi
 mv -f "$tmp" "$manifest"
 chmod 600 "$manifest" 2>/dev/null || true
' _ "$manifest"
return $?

local manifest="${1:-}" name="${2:-}" file_path="${3:-}" mime="${4:-}" timeout="${5:-$BASH4LLM_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MODELS}"
local destdir="" lockfile="" part_b64="" tmpstamp="" tmp_part="" rc=""
[ -f "$file_path" ] || { log_error "MANIFESTFAIL" "manifest_add_part: file not found: $file_path"; return 1; }
safe_mkdir "$(dirname "$manifest")" 700
lockfile="${manifest}.lock"
destdir="$(dirname "$manifest")"
tmpstamp="$(date +%s)-$$"
part_b64="$destdir/parts-$(basename "$file_path").${tmpstamp}.b64"
tmp_part="$(_tmpf file "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" part 2>/dev/null)" || {
  log_error "TMP" "manifest_add_part: _tmpf failed for BASH4LLM_TMPDIR"
  return 1
}
if ! b64encode < "$file_path" > "$tmp_part"; then
  rm -f "$tmp_part" 2>/dev/null || true
  log_error "B64FAIL" "manifest_add_part: b64 encode failed"
  return 1
fi
mv -f "$tmp_part" "$part_b64" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f "$tmp_part" 2>/dev/null || true; log_error "MANIFESTFAIL" "cannot move staged part to $part_b64"; return 1; }
chmod 600 "$part_b64" 2>/dev/null || true
lock_exec "$lockfile" "$timeout" -- bash -c '
  set -e
  manifest="$1"
  part_b64="$2"
  name="$3"
  mime="$4"
  tmp="$(mktemp "$(dirname "$manifest")/manifest.edit.XXXXXX")"
  if [ -f "${manifest}.b64" ]; then
    base64 ${B64_DECODE_OPT} < "${manifest}.b64" > "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || printf "%s" "{\"parts\":[]}" > "$tmp"
  elif [ -f "$manifest" ]; then
    cp -f "$manifest" "$tmp"
  else
    printf "%s" "{\"parts\":[]}" > "$tmp"
  fi
  jq --arg name "$name" --arg path "$part_b64" --arg enc "b64" --arg type "$mime" \
     ".parts += [{name:\$name, path:\$part_b64, encoding:\$enc, type:\$type}]" "$tmp" > "${tmp}.new"
  mv -f "${tmp}.new" "$tmp"
  if [ -n "${B64_WRAP_OPT:-}" ]; then
    base64 ${B64_WRAP_OPT} "$tmp" > "${manifest}.b64"
  else
    base64 "$tmp" | tr -d "\n" > "${manifest}.b64"
  fi
  cp -f "$tmp" "$manifest"
  chmod 600 "$manifest" 2>/dev/null || true
  rm -f "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
' _ "$manifest" "$part_b64" "$name" "$mime" || { log_error "MANIFESTFAIL" "manifest_add_part: update failed"; return 1; }
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  log_info "MANIFEST_ADD" "added part $name -> $part_b64"
fi
return 0

local manifest="${1:-}"
if [ -f "$manifest" ]; then
  cat "$manifest"
  return 0
fi
if [ -f "${manifest}.b64" ]; then
  b64decode < "${manifest}.b64"
  return $?
fi
return 1

local path="${1:-}" perm=""
if [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 1 ] || [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 1 ]; then
  perm="$(stat -f %Sp "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)"
else
  if command -v stat >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    perm="$(stat -c %A "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  elif command -v ls >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    perm="$(ls -ld -- "$path" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || true)"
  fi
fi
printf '%s' "$perm"

local path="${1:-}" owner=""
if [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 1 ] || [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 1 ]; then
  owner="$(stat -f %Su "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)"
else
  if command -v stat >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    owner="$(stat -c %U "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  elif command -v ls >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    owner="$(ls -ld -- "$path" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $3}' || true)"
  fi
fi
printf '%s' "$owner"

local path="${1:-}"
local hash="" stat_out="" dev="" inode="" size="" ctime="" mtime="" uid="" gid="" mode="" use_hash
[ -f "$path" ] || { printf ''; return 0; }
use_hash="${BASH4LLM_SIG_HASH:-1}"
if [ "${use_hash}" != "0" ]; then
  if [ "${BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_ACTIVE:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    hash="$(_secure_hash_sha256 "$path" 2>/dev/null)"
  elif command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    hash="$(sha256sum "$path" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || true)"
  fi
else
  hash=""
fi
if [ "${BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS:-0}" -eq 1 ] || [ "${BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  stat_out="$(stat -f '%d %i %z %c %m %u %g %p' "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)"
else
  stat_out="$(stat -c '%d %i %s %Z %Y %u %g %a' "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi
if [ -z "${stat_out:-}" ]; then
  dev=""; inode=""; size=""; ctime=""; mtime=""; uid=""; gid=""; mode=""
else
  read -r dev inode size ctime mtime uid gid mode <<EOF
$stat_out
EOF
  if [ -z "${dev:-}" ] && [ -z "${inode:-}" ] && [ -z "${size:-}" ]; then
    dev=""; inode=""; size=""; ctime=""; mtime=""; uid=""; gid=""; mode=""
  fi
fi
printf '%s|%s|%s|%s|%s|%s|%s|%s|%s' \
  "${hash:-}" "${dev:-}" "${inode:-}" "${size:-}" "${ctime:-}" "${mtime:-}" "${uid:-}" "${gid:-}" "${mode:-}"
_get_file_signature "$1"

local d="${1:-}" perms others_write
[ -d "$d" ] || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
perms="$(_get_perm_string "$d")"
[ -z "$perms" ] && return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
others_write="$(printf '%s' "$perms" | awk '{print substr($0,9,1)}')"
[ "$others_write" = "w" ]

umask 077
local tmpd="" lockfile="" rc=""
lockfile="$TMP_LOCK"
safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" 700
tmpd="$(lock_exec "$lockfile" "$BASH4LLM_LOCK_TIMEOUT_TMP" -- _tmpf dir "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" groq)"
rc=$?
if [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -n "$tmpd" ]; then
  printf '%s' "$tmpd"
  return 0
else
  log_error "TMP" "make_tmpdir: failed to safely create secure temporary directory"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi

local mode="${1:-}" base="${2:-}" prefix="${3:-groq}" tmp=""
if [ -z "$mode" ]; then
  log_error "TMP" "_tmpf usage: _tmpf <file|dir> <base_dir> [prefix]"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if [ -z "${BASH4LLM_TMPDIR:-}" ]; then
  log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: BASH4LLM_TMPDIR not set"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if [ ! -d "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" ]; then
  log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: BASH4LLM_TMPDIR does not exist: $BASH4LLM_TMPDIR"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
if [ -L "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" ]; then
  log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: BASH4LLM_TMPDIR is a symlink: $BASH4LLM_TMPDIR"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
chmod 700 "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR" 2>/dev/null || true
case "$base" in
  "$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR"/*|"$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR")
    ;;
  *)
    base="$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR"
    ;;
esac
umask 077
if [ "$mode" = "file" ]; then
  tmp="$(mktemp "$base/${prefix}.XXXXXX" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -z "$tmp" ]; then
    log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: mktemp failed for file in $base"
    return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  chmod 600 "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '%s' "$tmp"
  return 0
elif [ "$mode" = "dir" ]; then
  tmp="$(mktemp -d "$base/${prefix}.XXXXXX" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -z "$tmp" ]; then
    log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: mktemp failed for dir in $base"
    return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  chmod 700 "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '%s' "$tmp"
  return 0
else
  log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: unknown mode: $mode"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi

local id="${1:-}"
if [ -z "$id" ]; then return 1; fi
if printf '%s' "$id" | grep -qE '^[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,128}$'; then return 0; else return 1; fi
date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ

local tid="${1:-}"
ensure_run_tmpdir || return 1
printf '%s' "$RUN_TMPDIR/thread-${tid}-messages.json"

local cmd="${1:-}"
local sanitized=""
sanitized="$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | sed -E 's/[A-Za-z0-9_]+=([^[:space:]]+)//g' | sed -E 's/(token|key|secret)[^[:space:]]*/[REDACTED]/Ig' )"
printf '%s' "$(printf '%s' "$sanitized" | cut -c1-256)"

local tid="${1:-}"
[ -n "$tid" ] || return 0
local idx_file="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state/threads/index.json"
if [ -f "$idx_file" ]; then
  if jq --arg tid "$tid" '(.threads // []) | index($tid) // empty' "$idx_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    :
  else
    local tmp_idx=""
    tmp_idx="$(_tmpf file "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}" uiidx 2>/dev/null)" || true
    if [ -n "$tmp_idx" ]; then
      if jq --arg tid "$tid" '.threads = ((.threads // []) + [$tid])' "$idx_file" > "${tmp_idx}.new" 2>/dev/null; then
        mv -f "${tmp_idx}.new" "$tmp_idx"
        ui_state_write "threads/index.json" "$(cat "$tmp_idx")" || true
      fi
      rm -f "$tmp_idx" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
  fi
else
  ui_state_write "threads/index.json" "{\"threads\":[]}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  ui_state_write "threads/index.json" "$(jq -c -n --arg tid "$tid" '{threads:[$tid]}')" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi

local tid="$1" tfile="$2" mfile="$3" ifile="$4" t_idx="$5"
rm -f -- "$tfile" 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f -- "${tfile}.concurrency.lock" 2>/dev/null || true
rm -rf -- "${tfile}.concurrency.lockdir" 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f -- "$mfile" 2>/dev/null || true
if [ -f "$ifile" ]; then
  if jq --arg tid "$tid" ".threads = (.threads - [\$tid])" "$ifile" > "$t_idx" 2>/dev/null; then
    mv -f "$t_idx" "$ifile" 2>/dev/null
    chmod 600 "$ifile" 2>/dev/null || true
  else
    rm -f "$t_idx" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
fi

local tid="${1:-}"
[ -n "$tid" ] || return 1
if ! thread_validate_id "$tid"; then
  log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id for deletion: $tid"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
local thread_file="${THREAD_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR:-.}/threads}/${tid}.ndjson"
local meta_file="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state/threads/${tid}.json"
local idx_file="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state/threads/index.json"
local tmp_idx=""
tmp_idx="${BASH4LLM_TMPDIR%/}/idx_del.$$.tmp"
lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" 10 -- _thread_delete_locked "$tid" "$thread_file" "$meta_file" "$idx_file" "$tmp_idx"
rm -f "$tmp_idx" 2>/dev/null || true
if type thread_cache_invalidate >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  thread_cache_invalidate "$tid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi
log_info "THREAD" "deleted thread $tid"
return 0

local mfile="$1" t_meta="$2" tid="$3" title="$4" m_count="$5" l_ts="$6"
if [ -f "$mfile" ] && jq -e . "$mfile" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  jq --arg title "$title" \
     --argjson msg_count "$m_count" \
     --arg last_ts "$l_ts" \
     ".title = \$title | .msg_count = \$msg_count | .last_ts = \$last_ts" "$mfile" > "$t_meta"
else
  jq -n --arg id "$tid" --arg title "$title" \
        --argjson msg_count "$m_count" --arg last_ts "$l_ts" \
        "{id:\$id, title:\$title, active:true, msg_count:\$msg_count, last_ts:\$l_ts}" > "$t_meta"
fi
mv -f "$t_meta" "$mfile"
chmod 600 "$mfile"

local tid="${1:-}" title="${2:-}"
[ -n "$tid" ] || return 1
if ! thread_validate_id "$tid"; then
  log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id for rename: $tid"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
title="$(printf '%s' "$title" | tr -d '\r\n' | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
[ -n "$title" ] || title="Thread ${tid:0:8}"
local meta_file="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state/threads/${tid}.json"
local tmp_meta="" msg_count=0 last_ts=""
local thread_file="${THREAD_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR:-.}/threads}/${tid}.ndjson"
tmp_meta="$(_tmpf file "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}" meta_ren 2>/dev/null)" || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
msg_count=0
last_ts=""
if [ -f "$thread_file" ]; then
  msg_count="$(wc -l < "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  local last_line
  last_line="$(tail -n 1 "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    last_ts="$(printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -r '.ts // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
  fi
fi
lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" 10 -- _thread_rename_locked "$meta_file" "$tmp_meta" "$tid" "$title" "$msg_count" "$last_ts"
rm -f "$tmp_meta" 2>/dev/null || true
log_info "THREAD" "renamed thread $tid to '$title'"
return 0

local tid="${THREAD_ID:-}"
[ -n "$tid" ] || return 0
if ! thread_validate_id "$tid"; then
  log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id: $tid"
  return 15
fi
local thread_file="${THREAD_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR:-.}/threads}/${tid}.ndjson"
local lockfile="${thread_file}.concurrency.lock"
if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -eq 1 ] || [ "${BASH4LLM_SKIP_NETWORK:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  return 0
fi
if [ -L "$lockfile" ]; then
  log_error "SEC" "thread lockfile is a symlink: $lockfile. Aborting."
  return 15
fi
safe_mkdir "$(dirname "$lockfile")" 700
local use_flock=0
if command -v flock >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_ANDROID" -eq 0 ] && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 0 ] && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 0 ]; then
  use_flock=1
fi
if [ "$use_flock" -eq 1 ]; then
  exec 8>"$lockfile" 2>/dev/null || return 0
  if ! flock -x -n 8 2>/dev/null; then
    log_error "THREAD" "Thread '$tid' is already active in another instance of Bash4LLM."
    exec 8>&- 2>/dev/null || true
    return 15
  fi
fi
return 0

local tid="${THREAD_ID:-}"
[ -n "$tid" ] || return 0
if ! thread_validate_id "$tid"; then
  log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id: $tid"
  return 15
fi
local thread_file="${THREAD_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR:-.}/threads}/${tid}.ndjson"
local lockfile="${thread_file}.concurrency.lock"
if [ -L "$lockfile" ]; then
  log_error "SEC" "thread lockfile is a symlink during release: $lockfile. Aborting."
  return 15
fi
local use_flock=0
if command -v flock >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_ANDROID" -eq 0 ] && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 0 ] && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 0 ]; then
  use_flock=1
fi
if [ "$use_flock" -eq 1 ] && { true 2>/dev/null <&8; }; then
  exec 8>&- 2>/dev/null || true
fi

local thread_file="${1:-}"
local n="${2:-10}"
local tmpf="${3:-}"
[ -n "$thread_file" ] || return 1
[ -n "$tmpf" ] || return 1
if ! tail -n "$n" "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null > "$tmpf"; then
  cp -f "$thread_file" "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true
fi

local tid="${1:-}" n="${2:-10}" out="${3:-}"
local history_dir="${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR:-$PWD/bash4llm.d/history}"
local thread_file="$history_dir/threads/${tid}.ndjson"
local tmpdir="${RUN_TMPDIR:-${BASH4LLM_TMPDIR:-$PWD/bash4llm.d/tmp}}"
local tmpf="" out_tmp="" line="" role="" content="" role_norm="" first="" msg_count=0 last_ts="" last_line="" meta_json=""
[ -n "$tid" ] || return 1
[ -n "$out" ] || return 1
if ! thread_validate_id "$tid"; then
  log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id: $tid"
  return 1
fi
safe_mkdir "${history_dir%/}/threads" 700
if ! printf '%s' "$n" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+$'; then n=10; fi
if [ "$n" -le 0 ]; then n=10; fi
safe_mkdir "${tmpdir%/}" 700
if ! : > "${tmpdir%/}/.bash4llm_tmp_check" 2>/dev/null; then
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    printf 'DEBUG: thread_read_window: tmpdir not writable: %s\n' "$tmpdir" >&2
  fi
  return 1
else
  rm -f "${tmpdir%/}/.bash4llm_tmp_check" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
tmpf="$(_tmpf file "$tmpdir" thread.read 2>/dev/null)" || { if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then printf 'DEBUG: thread_read_window: cannot create tmpf\n' >&2; fi; return 1; }
if [ -f "$thread_file" ]; then
  lock_exec "${thread_file}.lock" 5 -- _thread_read_window_locked "$thread_file" "$n" "$tmpf"
else
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    printf 'DEBUG: thread_read_window: thread file not found: %s\n' "$thread_file" >&2
  fi
fi
out_tmp="$(_tmpf file "$(dirname "$out")" out.tmp 2>/dev/null)" || { if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then printf 'DEBUG: thread_read_window: cannot create out_tmp\n' >&2; fi; return 1; }
safe_mkdir "$(dirname "$out")" 700
: > "$out_tmp"
chmod 600 "$out_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
if ! jq -s -R -c '
  [ split("\n")[] | select(length > 0) | try fromjson catch null | select(. != null) ] |
  {
    messages: map({
      role: (if .role == "user" or .role == "assistant" or .role == "system" then .role else "user" end),
      content: (.content // "")
    })
  }
' "$tmpf" > "$out_tmp" 2>/dev/null; then
  log_error "THREAD" "Failed to safely process history NDJSON payload."
  rm -f "$out_tmp" "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 1
fi
if mv -f "$out_tmp" "$out" 2>/dev/null; then
  :
else
  cp -f "$out_tmp" "$out" 2>/dev/null || true
  rm -f "$out_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
rm -f "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true
chmod 600 "$out" 2>/dev/null || true
if [ -n "$tid" ]; then
  if ensure_run_tmpdir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    msg_count=0
    last_ts=""
    if [ -f "$thread_file" ]; then
      msg_count="$(wc -l < "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
      last_line="$(tail -n 1 "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
      if printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        last_ts="$(printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -r '.ts // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
      fi
    fi
    meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg id "$tid" --argjson msg_count "$msg_count" --arg last_ts "${last_ts:-}" '{id:$id, active:(( $msg_count | tonumber) > 0), msg_count:$msg_count, last_ts:$last_ts}')"
    ui_state_write "threads/${tid}.json" "$meta_json" || log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to update thread meta for $tid (read_window)"
  fi
fi
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf 'DEBUG: thread_read_window done: out=%s size=%s tmpf=%s\n' "$out" "$( [ -f "$out" ] && wc -c < "$out" || echo 0 )" "$tmpf" >&2
fi
return 0

local tid="${1:-}" role="${2:-}" content="${3:-}" meta_json="${4:-}"
local base_threads_dir="${THREAD_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR:-./bash4llm.d}/threads}"
local thread_file="${base_threads_dir%/}/${tid}.ndjson"
local lockfile="${thread_file}.lock"
local invocation_ts="" message_id="" marker="" normalized="" rand="" tmpf="" found=0 role_norm="" line="" timeout=""
local marker_dir="" created_marker=0 sess_dir="" tmp_init="" msg_count=0 last_ts="" last_line="" idx_file="" tmp_idx=""
local meta_file="" current_title="" first_content=""
[ -n "$tid" ] || return 1
if ! thread_validate_id "$tid"; then
  log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id: $tid"
  return 1
fi
invocation_ts="$(thread_now_ts)"
message_id="$(printf '%s' "$meta_json" | jq -r '.id // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
if [ -z "$message_id" ]; then
  normalized="$(printf '%s' "$content" | sed -e 's/\r$//' -e 's/\r\n/\n/g' | awk '{$1=$1; print}')"
  rand="$(printf '%04x' $((RANDOM & 0xFFFF)))"
  if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    message_id="$(printf '%s|%s|%s' "$normalized" "$invocation_ts" "$rand" | sha256sum | cut -c1-16)"
  elif command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    message_id="$(printf '%s|%s|%s' "$normalized" "$invocation_ts" "$rand" | openssl dgst -sha256 | awk '{print $2}' | cut -c1-16)"
  else
    message_id="$rand"
  fi
fi
sess_dir="$(dirname "$thread_file")"
safe_mkdir "$sess_dir" 700
if [ ! -f "$thread_file" ]; then
  tmp_init="$(_tmpf file "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}" thread.init 2>/dev/null)" || true
  : > "${tmp_init:-/dev/null}" 2>/dev/null || true
  if ! mv -f "$tmp_init" "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null; then
    cp -f "$tmp_init" "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
  chmod 600 "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
case "$role" in user|assistant|system) role_norm="$role" ;; *) role_norm="user" ;; esac
if [ "$role_norm" = "user" ] && [ -z "${content:-}" ]; then
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    log_info "THREAD" "skipping append of empty user message for thread $tid"
  fi
  return 0
fi
if [ -n "${message_id:-}" ]; then
  marker_dir="${RUN_TMPDIR:-$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}/thread-msg-${message_id}.lockdir"
  if mkdir "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null; then
    printf '%s\n' "$$" > "${marker_dir}/owner.pid" 2>/dev/null || true
    printf '%s\n' "$(date +%s)" > "${marker_dir}/owner.ts" 2>/dev/null || true
    chmod 700 "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true
    created_marker=1
  else
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "THREAD" "append skipped: marker exists for message_id $message_id"
    fi
    return 0
  fi
else
  marker_dir="${RUN_TMPDIR:-$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}/run-$$-${RANDOM}.lockdir"
  mkdir -p "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '%s\n' "$$" > "${marker_dir}/owner.pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '%s\n' "$(date +%s)" > "${marker_dir}/owner.ts" 2>/dev/null || true
  chmod 700 "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true
  created_marker=1
fi
line="$(jq -c -n \
  --arg ts "$invocation_ts" \
  --arg role "$role_norm" \
  --arg content "$content" \
  --argjson meta "$(printf '%s' "$meta_json" | jq -c '.' 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' '{}')" \
  '{ts:$ts, role:$role, content:$content, meta:$meta}')"
timeout="${BASH4LLM_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HISTORY:-10}"
local use_flock=0
if command -v flock >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_ANDROID" -eq 0 ] && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_MACOS" -eq 0 ] && [ "$BASH4LLM_PLAT_BSD" -eq 0 ]; then
  use_flock=1
fi
local write_success=0
if [ "$use_flock" -eq 1 ]; then
  (
    exec 200>"$lockfile"
    if flock -x -w "$timeout" 200 2>/dev/null; then
      if [ -n "${message_id:-}" ] && grep -F -q "\"id\":\"$message_id\"" "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null; then
        exit 0
      fi
      printf "%s\n" "$line" >> "$thread_file"
    else
      exit 124
    fi
  )
  local append_rc=$?
  if [ "$append_rc" -eq 0 ]; then
    write_success=1
  else
    if [ "${created_marker:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then rm -rf -- "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
    log_error "THREAD" "lock-append execution failed (code $append_rc)"
    return 1
  fi
else
  local fallback_lockdir="${thread_file}.fallback.lockdir"
  local start_time now acquired=0
  start_time=$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  while :; do
    if mkdir "$fallback_lockdir" 2>/dev/null; then acquired=1; break; fi
    now=$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    if [ $((now - start_time)) -ge "$timeout" ]; then break; fi
    sleep 0.1 2>/dev/null || sleep 1
  done
  if [ "$acquired" -eq 1 ]; then
    if [ -n "${message_id:-}" ] && grep -F -q "\"id\":\"$message_id\"" "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null; then
      rmdir "$fallback_lockdir" 2>/dev/null || true
      return 0
    fi
    printf "%s\n" "$line" >> "$thread_file"
    write_success=1
    rmdir "$fallback_lockdir" 2>/dev/null || true
  else
    if [ "${created_marker:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then rm -rf -- "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
    log_error "THREAD" "fallback directory lock acquisition timed out"
    return 1
  fi
fi
if [ "$write_success" -eq 1 ]; then
  chmod 600 "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null || true
  touch "${marker_dir}/done" 2>/dev/null || true
  if ensure_run_tmpdir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    msg_count=0
    last_ts=""
    if [ -f "$thread_file" ]; then
      msg_count="$(wc -l < "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
      last_line="$(tail -n 1 "$thread_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
      if printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        last_ts="$(printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -r '.ts // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)"
      fi
    fi
    meta_file="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state/threads/${tid}.json"
    current_title=""
    if [ -f "$meta_file" ]; then
      current_title="$(jq -r '.title // empty' "$meta_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
    fi
    if [ -z "$current_title" ] && [ "$msg_count" -ge 1 ]; then
      first_content=""
      if [ -f "$thread_file" ]; then
        first_content="$(jq -r 'select(.role=="user") | .content' "$thread_file" | head -n 1 | tr -d '\n\r' | cut -c 1-35)"
      fi
      [ -z "$first_content" ] && first_content="Thread ${tid:0:8}"
      current_title="$first_content"
    fi
    meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg id "$tid" --argjson msg_count "$msg_count" --arg last_ts "${last_ts:-}" --arg title "${current_title:-}" \
      '{id:$id, active:true, msg_count:$msg_count, last_ts:$last_ts, title:$title}')"
    ui_state_write "threads/${tid}.json" "$meta_json" || log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to write thread meta for $tid"
    lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" 10 -- _update_thread_index "$tid"
  fi
fi
if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  log_info "THREAD" "appended message id ${message_id:-<no-id>} to $thread_file"
fi
return 0

local s="${1:-}" h=""
if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  h="$(printf '%s' "$s" | sha256sum 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || true)"
elif command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  h="$(printf '%s' "$s" | openssl dgst -sha256 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}' || true)"
else
  h="$(printf '%s' "$s" | base64 | tr -d '\n' | cut -c1-64)"
fi
printf '%s' "${h:-}"

local tid="${1:-}" params="${2:-}"
[ -n "$tid" ] || return 1
params="${params:-}"
printf '%s|%s' "$tid" "$(_thread_hash "$params")"

local tid="${1:-}" params="${2:-}" out="${3:-}"
local key="" file="" ts="" now="" ttl=""
key="$(thread_cache_key "$tid" "$params")" || return 1
file="${THREAD_CACHE_DIR%/}/${key}.cache"
if [ ! -f "$file" ]; then return 1; fi
read -r ts < "$file" 2>/dev/null || ts=0
now="$(date +%s)"
if [ "$now" -ge "$ts" ]; then
  rm -f "$file" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 1
fi
if [ -n "$out" ]; then
  tail -n +2 "$file" > "$out" 2>/dev/null || return 1
else
  tail -n +2 "$file" 2>/dev/null || return 0
fi
return 0

local tid="${1:-}" params="${2:-}" ttl="${3:-300}" infile="${4:-}"
local key="" file="" expiry="" now="" tmp_cache=""
key="$(thread_cache_key "$tid" "$params")" || return 1
file="${THREAD_CACHE_DIR%/}/${key}.cache"
now="$(date +%s)"
expiry=$((now + (ttl + 0)))
tmp_cache="$(_tmpf file "${THREAD_CACHE_DIR%/}" thread.cache 2>/dev/null)" || return 1
if {
  printf '%s\n' "$expiry"
  if [ -n "$infile" ] && [ -f "$infile" ]; then
    cat "$infile"
  else
    cat -
  fi
} > "$tmp_cache" 2>/dev/null; then
  chmod 600 "$tmp_cache" 2>/dev/null || true
  if mv -f "$tmp_cache" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    chmod 600 "$file" 2>/dev/null || true
    return 0
  else
    rm -f "$tmp_cache" 2>/dev/null || true
    return 1
  fi
else
  rm -f "$tmp_cache" 2>/dev/null || true
  return 1
fi

local tid="${1:-}" params="${2:-}" key="" f=""
if [ -z "$tid" ]; then return 1; fi
if [ -n "$params" ]; then
  key="$(thread_cache_key "$tid" "$params")" || return 1
  rm -f "${THREAD_CACHE_DIR%/}/${key}.cache" 2>/dev/null || true
else
  for f in "${THREAD_CACHE_DIR%/}/${tid}|"*.cache; do
    [ -e "$f" ] && rm -f -- "$f" 2>/dev/null || true
  done
fi
return 0

local var val
for var in ALLOW_API_CALLS DRY_RUN DEBUG; do
  val=""
  if declare -p "$var" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    val="${!var}"
  fi
  if [ -n "$val" ]; then
    if is_truthy "$val"; then
      export "$var"=1
    else
      export "$var"=0
    fi
  fi
done

blocks.body:
if type ensure_config_dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  ensure_config_dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
else
  safe_mkdir "${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR}" 700
fi

if [ "${BASH4LLM_SOURCE_ONLY:-0}" -eq 0 ]; then
  if ! ensure_run_tmpdir >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    log_error "TMP" "cannot create or access RUN_TMPDIR ($BASH4LLM_TMPDIR). Aborting."
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
fi
